title: Two assertions firing when dealing with generate with arrays of structs

features.name: packed struct array type declaration
features.description: Code should include a typedef struct packed declaration with a logic field

features.name: array of packed structs as module port
features.description: Code should include an array of packed structs used as a module input port

features.name: generate for loop with out-of-bounds array access
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop where loop variable exceeds array bounds

features.name: continuous assignment inside generate block
features.description: Code should include an assign statement inside a generate block accessing array elements
